name: Twinbox task tools
description: Registers deterministic agent tools that run twinbox task, queue, and schedule subcommands.

twinboxBin.description: Optional Twinbox executable path on the Gateway host. Prefer an absolute path. If unset, the plugin auto-detects <cwd>/scripts/twinbox before falling back to twinbox from PATH.

cwd.description: Working directory (Twinbox code root). Falls back to TWINBOX_CODE_ROOT env if unset and is also used to auto-detect <cwd>/scripts/twinbox.

openclawBin.description: Optional OpenClaw CLI path on the Gateway host (passed to twinbox --openclaw-bin for bridge health and onboarding-confirm-push).
